# google_chronicle_dashboard_chart

A chart resource used within a NativeDashboard. Its lifecycle (Create, Update, Delete) is managed via custom methods on the NativeDashboard resource.

~> **Warning:** This resource is in beta, and should be used with the terraform-provider-google-beta provider.
See [Provider Versions](../guides/provider_versions.html.markdown) for more details on beta resources.

To get more information about DashboardChart, see:

* [API documentation](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/reference/rest/v1beta/projects.locations.instances.dashboardCharts)
* How-to Guides
    * [Google SecOps Guides](https://cloud.google.com/chronicle/docs/secops/secops-overview)

## Example Usage - Chronicle Dashboardchart Basic


```hcl
# A Native Dashboard is required to create a Dashboard Chart.
resource "google_chronicle_native_dashboard" "my_dashboard" {
  provider     = google-beta
  location     = "us" 
  instance     = "%{chronicle_id}"
  display_name = "tf-test-dashboard-1%{random_suffix}"
  description  = "tf-test-dashboard-description%{random_suffix}"
  access       = "DASHBOARD_PRIVATE"
  type         = "CUSTOM"


  filters {
    id                                    = "GlobalTimeFilter"
    display_name                          = "Global Time Filter"
    data_source                           = "GLOBAL"
    is_standard_time_range_filter         = true
    is_standard_time_range_filter_enabled = true
    filter_operator_and_field_values {
      filter_operator = "PAST"
      field_values    = ["1", "DAY"]
    }
  }
}

resource "google_chronicle_dashboard_chart" "my_chart" {
  provider         = google-beta
  location         = "us" # Example region, adjust as necessary
  instance         = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  # This parameter creates an implicit dependency: Terraform will create
  # 'google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard' before creating this chart.
  native_dashboard = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.name

  # These fields are passed to the NativeDashboardService.AddChart RPC.
  chart_layout {
    span_x  = 42
    span_y  = 27
    start_x = 0
    start_y = 0
  }

  dashboard_chart {
    display_name = "testchart_1"
    description  = "Managed by Terraform AccTest"
    tile_type    = "TILE_TYPE_VISUALIZATION"
    chart_datasource {
      data_sources = ["INGESTION_METRICS"]
    }
    visualization {
      # The query produces a single outcome variable: $event_count.
      # The visualization is configured to display this.
      column_defs {
        field  = "event_count"
        header = "event_count"
      }
      x_axes {
        axis_type = "VALUE"
      }
      y_axes {
        axis_type = "VALUE"
      }
      # The 'series' block is omitted because the input JSON had an empty series array.
      table_config {
        enable_text_wrap = false
      }
      legends {
        legend_orient = "HORIZONTAL"
      }
      series_column = []
      grouping_type = "Off"
      threshold_coloring_enabled = false
    }
  }

  dashboard_query {
    # The Malachite Query Language (MQL) query, with double quotes escaped.
    query = "ingestion.component = \"Ingestion API\" \ningestion.log_type != \"\" \noutcome: $event_count = math.round(sum(ingestion.log_count)/(1000*1000), 2)\n"
    input {
      # Matches the relativeTime from the provided JSON.
      relative_time {
        time_unit      = "SECOND"
        start_time_val = "1"
      }
    }
  }
}
```
## Example Usage - Chronicle Dashboardchart Full


```hcl
# A Native Dashboard is required to create a Dashboard Chart.
resource "google_chronicle_native_dashboard" "my_dashboard" {
  provider     = google-beta
  location     = "us" # Example region, adjust as necessary
  instance     = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
  display_name = "dashboard_1"
  description  = "dashboard_description"
  access       = "DASHBOARD_PRIVATE"
  type         = "CUSTOM"

  # REFINED: The 'definition' wrapper is removed because flatten_object is true.
  # 'filters' and 'charts' are now top-level blocks.
  filters {
    id                                    = "GlobalTimeFilter"
    display_name                          = "Global Time Filter"
    data_source                           = "GLOBAL"
    is_standard_time_range_filter         = true
    is_standard_time_range_filter_enabled = true
    filter_operator_and_field_values {
      filter_operator = "PAST"
      field_values    = ["1", "DAY"]
    }
  }

  # Note: 'charts' block is intentionally omitted here as it is managed 
  # by the 'google_chronicle_dashboard_chart' resource lifecycle.
}

resource "google_chronicle_dashboard_chart" "my_chart" {
  provider         = google-beta
  location         = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.location
  instance         = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.instance
  native_dashboard = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.name

  # Chart layout (satisfies the ValidateChartLayout Go logic)
  chart_layout {
    start_x = 0
    span_x  = 50
    start_y = 12
    span_y  = 18
  }

  dashboard_chart {
    display_name = "Data Source Health Overview"
    description  = "Health of data sources over time"
    tile_type    = "TILE_TYPE_VISUALIZATION"

    chart_datasource {
      data_sources = ["IOC_MATCHES"]
    }

    visualization {
      series {
        series_type = "LINE"
        encode {
          x = "timestamp"
          y = "total_count"
        }
        data_label {
          show = true
        }
      }

      x_axes {
        axis_type    = "CATEGORY"
        display_name = "Date"
      }

      y_axes {
        axis_type    = "CATEGORY"
        display_name = "Sources"
      }

      legends {
        top           = 12
        legend_orient = "HORIZONTAL"
        show         = true
        id           = "test_map_legend_01"
        bottom       =  10
        left         =  10
        right        =  5
        legend_align = "LEFT"
        padding      = [10]
        z            = 2
        z_level      = 1
      }

      series_column = ["health_status"]
      grouping_type = "Grouped"
    }

    drill_down_config {
      left_drill_downs {
        id           = "D89B834D-977A-4E0C-83B0-12AB1D05E76B"
        display_name = "Link to the google"
        custom_settings {
          new_tab = true
          external_link {
            description = "This is an external link"
            link        = "www.google.com"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  dashboard_query {
    query = <<-EOT
      $IOC_Type = ioc.ioc_type
      
      match:
        $IOC_Type
      
      outcome:
        $IOC_Count = count(ioc.ioc_value) 
      
      order:
        $IOC_Count desc
    EOT

    input {
      relative_time {
        time_unit      = "DAY"
        start_time_val = "1"
      }
    }
  }
}

resource "google_chronicle_dashboard_chart" "button_tile" {
  provider         = google-beta
  location         = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.location
  instance         = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.instance
  native_dashboard = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.name

  chart_layout {
    start_x = 0
    span_x  = 12
    start_y = 66
    span_y  = 4
  }

  dashboard_chart {
    display_name = "Navigation Button"
    tile_type    = "TILE_TYPE_BUTTON"

    visualization {
      button {
        description = "This is a button tile"
        label       = "View Custom Detection Rules"
        hyperlink   = "/rulesDashboard"
        new_tab     = true
        properties {
          color        = "#1a73e8"
          button_style = "BUTTON_STYLE_TRANSPARENT"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

resource "google_chronicle_dashboard_chart" "markdown_tile" {
  provider         = google-beta
  location         = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.location
  instance         = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.instance
  native_dashboard = google_chronicle_native_dashboard.my_dashboard.name

  # Note: Ensure start_y does not overlap with your previous charts
  chart_layout {
    start_x = 0
    span_x  = 24
    start_y = 48
    span_y  = 4
  }

  dashboard_chart {
    display_name = "markdown"
    tile_type    = "TILE_TYPE_MARKDOWN"

    visualization {
      markdown {
        content = "### Dashboard Header\nThis is a markdown block used for descriptions or section headers."
        
        properties {
          background_color = "#09326C"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:


* `dashboard_chart` -
  (Required)
  Core configuration details for the DashboardChart.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart).

* `location` -
  (Required)
  The location of the Chronicle instance.

* `instance` -
  (Required)
  The ID of the Chronicle instance.


* `native_dashboard` -
  (Optional)
  The parent NativeDashboard resource name, formatted as projects/{project}/locations/{location}/instances/{instance}/nativeDashboards/{dashboard_id}

* `dashboard_query` -
  (Optional)
  The complete specification of the query for this chart. This includes the raw query string, execution parameters (like time windows), and server-generated metadata.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_query).

* `chart_layout` -
  (Optional)
  The layout of this chart within the NativeDashboard.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_chart_layout).

* `project` - (Optional) The ID of the project in which the resource belongs.
    If it is not provided, the provider project is used.



<a name="nested_dashboard_chart"></a>The `dashboard_chart` block supports:

* `name` -
  (Output)
  The resource name of the DashboardChart.

* `display_name` -
  (Required)
  Display name/Title of the dashboardChart visible to users.

* `description` -
  (Optional)
  Description of the dashboardChart.

* `tile_type` -
  (Optional)
  Type of tile (e.g., visualization, button, markdown).
  Possible values are: `TILE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`, `TILE_TYPE_VISUALIZATION`, `TILE_TYPE_BUTTON`, `TILE_TYPE_MARKDOWN`.

* `chart_datasource` -
  (Optional)
  Query and datasource used in the chart.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_chart_datasource).

* `visualization` -
  (Required)
  Visualization config for a chart.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization).

* `drill_down_config` -
  (Optional)
  Drill down configuration.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config).

* `etag` -
  (Output)
  This checksum is computed by the server.


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_chart_datasource"></a>The `chart_datasource` block supports:

* `data_sources` -
  (Optional)
  Name(s) of the datasource used in the chart. Available values include:
  'UDM', 'ENTITY', 'INGESTION_METRICS', 'RULE_DETECTIONS', 'RULESETS',
  'GLOBAL', 'IOC_MATCHES', 'RULES', 'SOAR_CASES', 'SOAR_PLAYBOOKS',
  'SOAR_CASE_HISTORY', 'DATA_TABLE', 'INVESTIGATION', 'INVESTIGATION_FEEDBACK'.

* `dashboard_query` -
  (Output)
  The unique system ID of the query linked to this chart.

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_visualization"></a>The `visualization` block supports:

* `x_axes` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_x_axes).

* `y_axes` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_y_axes).

* `series` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_series).

* `tooltip` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_tooltip).

* `legends` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_legends).

* `column_defs` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_column_defs).

* `table_config` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_table_config).

* `button` -
  (Optional)
  Button config if tileType is TILE_TYPE_BUTTON.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_button).

* `markdown` -
  (Optional)
  Markdown config if tileType is TILE_TYPE_MARKDOWN.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_markdown).

* `series_column` -
  (Optional)

* `grouping_type` -
  (Optional)

* `google_maps_config` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_google_maps_config).

* `threshold_coloring_enabled` -
  (Optional)

* `visual_maps` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_visual_maps).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_x_axes"></a>The `x_axes` block supports:

* `axis_type` -
  (Optional)
  Possible values are: `VALUE`, `CATEGORY`, `TIME`, `LOG`.

* `display_name` -
  (Optional)

* `min` -
  (Optional)

* `max` -
  (Optional)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_y_axes"></a>The `y_axes` block supports:

* `axis_type` -
  (Optional)
  Possible values are: `VALUE`, `CATEGORY`, `TIME`, `LOG`.

* `display_name` -

* `max` -
  (Optional)

  (Optional)

  (Optional)

  (Optional)

* `field` -
  (Optional)

  (Optional)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_series_metric_trend_config"></a>The `metric_trend_config` block supports:

* `visual_map_type` -
  (Optional)
  Possible values are: `VISUAL_MAP_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`, `CONTINUOUS`, `PIECEWISE`.

* `pieces` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_visual_maps_pieces).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_visualization_visual_maps_pieces"></a>The `pieces` block supports:

* `min` -
  (Optional)

* `max` -
  (Optional)

* `color` -
  (Optional)

* `label` -
  (Optional)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config"></a>The `drill_down_config` block supports:

  (Optional)

* `right_drill_downs` -
  (Optional)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs"></a>The `left_drill_downs` block supports:

  (Required)

  (Optional)

  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_default_settings"></a>The `default_settings` block supports:

* `enabled` -
  (Required)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings"></a>The `custom_settings` block supports:

* `new_tab` -
  (Required)

* `left_click_column` -
  (Optional)

* `query` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_query).

* `filter` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter).

* `external_link` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_external_link).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_query"></a>The `query` block supports:

* `query` -
  (Required)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter"></a>The `filter` block supports:

* `dashboard_filters` -
  (Required)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters"></a>The `dashboard_filters` block supports:

  (Required)

* `filter_operator_and_values` -
  (Required)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters_filter_operator_and_values).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters_filter_operator_and_values"></a>The `filter_operator_and_values` block supports:

* `field_values` -
  (Optional)

* `filter_operator` -
  (Optional)
  Possible values are: `EQUAL`, `NOT_EQUAL`, `IN`, `GREATER_THAN`, `GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL_TO`, `LESS_THAN`, `LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL_TO`, `BETWEEN`, `PAST`, `IS_NULL`, `IS_NOT_NULL`, `STARTS_WITH`, `ENDS_WITH`, `DOES_NOT_STARTS_WITH`, `DOES_NOT_ENDS_WITH`, `NOT_IN`, `CONTAINS`, `DOES_NOT_CONTAIN`.

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_left_drill_downs_custom_settings_external_link"></a>The `external_link` block supports:

* `link` -
  (Required)

* `description` -
  (Optional)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs"></a>The `right_drill_downs` block supports:

* `id` -
  (Required)

* `display_name` -
  (Required)

* `default_settings` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_default_settings).

* `custom_settings` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_default_settings"></a>The `default_settings` block supports:

* `enabled` -
  (Required)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings"></a>The `custom_settings` block supports:

* `new_tab` -
  (Required)

* `query` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_query).

* `filter` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter).

* `external_link` -
  (Optional)
  A nested object resource.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_external_link).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_query"></a>The `query` block supports:

* `query` -
  (Required)

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter"></a>The `filter` block supports:

* `dashboard_filters` -
  (Required)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters"></a>The `dashboard_filters` block supports:

* `dashboard_filter_id` -
  (Required)

* `filter_operator_and_values` -
  (Required)
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters_filter_operator_and_values).


<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_filter_dashboard_filters_filter_operator_and_values"></a>The `filter_operator_and_values` block supports:

* `field_values` -
  (Optional)

* `filter_operator` -
  (Optional)
  Possible values are: `EQUAL`, `NOT_EQUAL`, `IN`, `GREATER_THAN`, `GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL_TO`, `LESS_THAN`, `LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL_TO`, `BETWEEN`, `PAST`, `IS_NULL`, `IS_NOT_NULL`, `STARTS_WITH`, `ENDS_WITH`, `DOES_NOT_STARTS_WITH`, `DOES_NOT_ENDS_WITH`, `NOT_IN`, `CONTAINS`, `DOES_NOT_CONTAIN`.

<a name="nested_dashboard_chart_drill_down_config_right_drill_downs_custom_settings_external_link"></a>The `external_link` block supports:

* `link` -
  (Required)

* `description` -
  (Optional)

<a name="nested_dashboard_query"></a>The `dashboard_query` block supports:

* `name` -
  (Output)
  name of the query.

* `query` -
  (Required)
  The raw query string.

* `input` -
  (Optional)
  Input parameters for the query, such as time windows.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_query_input).

* `etag` -
  (Output)
  This checksum is computed by the server.


<a name="nested_dashboard_query_input"></a>The `input` block supports:

* `time_window` -
  (Optional)
  Specific start and end times.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_query_input_time_window).

* `relative_time` -
  (Optional)
  Relative time range.
  Structure is [documented below](#nested_dashboard_query_input_relative_time).


<a name="nested_dashboard_query_input_time_window"></a>The `time_window` block supports:

* `start_time` -
  (Optional)

* `end_time` -
  (Optional)

<a name="nested_dashboard_query_input_relative_time"></a>The `relative_time` block supports:

* `start_time_val` -
  (Required)

* `time_unit` -
  (Required)
  The time unit for the relative range.
  Possible values are: `SECOND`, `MINUTE`, `HOUR`, `DAY`, `WEEK`, `MONTH`, `YEAR`.

<a name="nested_chart_layout"></a>The `chart_layout` block supports:

* `start_x` -
  (Optional)

* `span_x` -
  (Required)

* `start_y` -
  (Optional)

* `span_y` -
  (Required)

## Attributes Reference

In addition to the arguments listed above, the following computed attributes are exported:

* `id` - an identifier for the resource with format `projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/instances/{{instance}}/dashboardCharts/{{chart_id}}`

* `name` -
  The full resource name of the DashboardChart.

* `chart_id` -
  The unique identifier of the chart, automatically extracted from the full resource name.


## Timeouts

This resource provides the following
[Timeouts](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/plugin/sdkv2/resources/retries-and-customizable-timeouts) configuration options:

- `create` - Default is 20 minutes.
- `update` - Default is 20 minutes.
- `delete` - Default is 20 minutes.

## Import


DashboardChart can be imported using any of these accepted formats:

* `projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/instances/{{instance}}/dashboardCharts/{{chart_id}}`
* `{{project}}/{{location}}/{{instance}}/{{chart_id}}`
* `{{location}}/{{instance}}/{{chart_id}}`


In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, use an [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) to import DashboardChart using one of the formats above. For example:

```tf
import {
  id = "projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/instances/{{instance}}/dashboardCharts/{{chart_id}}"
  to = google_chronicle_dashboard_chart.default
}
```

When using the [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import), DashboardChart can be imported using one of the formats above. For example:

```
$ terraform import google_chronicle_dashboard_chart.default projects/{{project}}/locations/{{location}}/instances/{{instance}}/dashboardCharts/{{chart_id}}
$ terraform import google_chronicle_dashboard_chart.default {{project}}/{{location}}/{{instance}}/{{chart_id}}
$ terraform import google_chronicle_dashboard_chart.default {{location}}/{{instance}}/{{chart_id}}
```

## User Project Overrides

This resource supports [User Project Overrides](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/google/latest/docs/guides/provider_reference#user_project_override).
